creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
1. Check your patch - option PIPEWIRE is in OPTIONS_DEFAULT.
2 and 3. Fifefox and Thunderbird have patches (in ports) with pipewire support.
4. KDE support pipewire on FreeBSD for more than year - I wrote patches for disable it(!). I don't use other DEs.

P.S. I'm using FreeBSD for servers and as 2nd OS on desktop from late 1990s too, but full migration on desktop was finished in 2009 only.
